name: Plivo
description: Cloud communication platform providing SMS, MMS, WhatsApp messaging and Voice APIs. A major Twilio alternative for programmatic communication.

capabilities.name: message_send
capabilities.description: Send an SMS, MMS, or WhatsApp message to one or more recipients.

capabilities.name: message_list
capabilities.description: List all messages with optional filtering by direction, state, and time.

capabilities.name: message_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific message by its UUID.

capabilities.name: message_media_list
capabilities.description: List all media files for a specific MMS message.

capabilities.name: call_create
capabilities.description: Initiate an outbound call.

capabilities.name: call_list
capabilities.description: List all calls with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: call_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific call by its UUID.

capabilities.name: call_hangup
capabilities.description: Hang up a specific live call.

capabilities.name: call_record
capabilities.description: Start recording on a live call.

capabilities.name: call_speak
capabilities.description: Play text-to-speech on a live call.

capabilities.name: number_list
capabilities.description: List all rented phone numbers.

capabilities.name: number_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific rented number.

capabilities.name: number_search
capabilities.description: Search for available phone numbers to rent.

capabilities.name: number_buy
capabilities.description: Rent a phone number.

capabilities.name: number_unrent
capabilities.description: Unrent (release) a phone number.

capabilities.name: application_create
capabilities.description: Create a new application for handling calls and messages.

capabilities.name: application_list
capabilities.description: List all applications.

capabilities.name: application_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific application by ID.

capabilities.name: application_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing application.

capabilities.name: application_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an application.

capabilities.name: account_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve account details.

capabilities.name: pricing_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve messaging or voice pricing for a specific country.
